categories.description: Smoke-test category. Should fire on terminals, code editors, IDEs, and other text-heavy UI.
positive_captions: a screenshot of a terminal with monospace text
a screenshot of a code editor
a screenshot of a programming IDE
a screenshot of source code on a dark background
a screenshot of a command line interface
a screenshot of a developer console with logs
a screenshot of documentation full of code samples
a screenshot of a text-heavy markdown document
negative_captions: a photograph of a beach at sunset
a photograph of a forest in autumn
a photograph of mountains and open sky
a photograph of a tropical landscape
a photograph of a city skyline at night
a photograph of flowers in a garden
a photograph of a hiking trail through trees
categories.threshold_note: Smoke test. Should fire reliably on any terminal or code editor.

categories.description: Smoke-test category. Should fire on outdoor nature photography and stay quiet on UI screenshots.
positive_captions: a photograph of a beach at sunset
a photograph of a forest in autumn
a photograph of mountains and sky
a photograph of a green landscape
a photograph of an ocean shoreline
a photograph of wildflowers in a meadow
a photograph of a tropical island
a photograph of a snowy mountain peak
negative_captions: a screenshot of a terminal with monospace text
a screenshot of a code editor
a screenshot of a web browser
a screenshot of an application user interface
a screenshot of a chat or messaging window
a screenshot of a settings panel
categories.threshold_note: Smoke test. Should stay quiet while looking at a code editor or terminal.

calibration_note: Hand-crafted smoke-test policy for end-to-end pipeline validation. Not a real values policy.
